name: Gîl-Quartzwraith
personality: Gîl-Quartzwraith drifts through your CI pipeline in a luminous top hat, its · pin-dot eyes watching a flaky test fail for the forty-seventh consecutive time with crystalline, unshakeable calm. Debugging is not in its haunting repertoire — it resolves bugs by outlasting them, which works more often than it should.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
